discoverability.competitive_assessment: Stasis on all fronts entering Day 24. Dome machine-readable infrastructure frozen since April 17 — ai_manifest.json, llms.txt, and llms-full.txt all byte-identical to yesterday. Our review infrastructure accurate and current: llms.txt correctly describes 71 WIN entries covering 69 dome WINs, with the paired sub-entry explanation. ClaimReview schema correctly mirrors dome's own headline figure (69 confirmed, 94.5%). No new dome infrastructure, no new author platform activity, no review mentions found in searches. The registry stability counter (Day 20 consecutive fires with no change) is the only noteworthy movement today.
